- [x] Clarify Project Requirements

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created Next.js project structure with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and required directories.

- [x] Customize the Project - Implemented core features including dashboard, work order management, email integration, and UI.

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project - Dependencies configured, run npm install.

- [x] Launch the Project - Run npm run dev to start development server.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md updated with setup instructions.
